target: Awwwards-worthy landing page for M-International (MLM/BADy, CIS market)

constraints.animation: Framer Motion + GSAP ScrollTrigger + Lenis (desktop only)

cis_rules.letter_spacing: normal for Cyrillic, NO negative values
cis_rules.text_length: 1-3 lines per screen, visual/video over long text blocks

roadmap.title: Awwwards Design Research and Pattern Library
roadmap.description: Research current Awwwards SOTD patterns for health/wellness/lifestyle categories. Build a pattern library of 15-20 reference sites with notes on scroll animation techniques, typography treatments, color strategies, and micro-interaction patterns. Focus on sites that balance premium aesthetics with conversion-focused MLM/business positioning.
deliverables: docs/awwwards-research.md - 15-20 reference sites with annotated screenshots
docs/pattern-library.md - Scroll animation, typography, color, CTA patterns
docs/anti-patterns.md - What to avoid based on Awwwards jury feedback
acceptance_criteria: Minimum 15 reference sites analyzed with specific technique notes
Pattern library covers: hero treatments, scroll reveals, card layouts, CTA designs
Anti-patterns documented with visual examples
All research specific to health/premium/lifestyle category

roadmap.title: Design Token System and CSS Architecture Overhaul
roadmap.description: Audit and enhance the existing token system in globals.css. Ensure all OKLCH color tokens, typography scale, spacing system, animation tokens, and z-index scale are complete and consistent. Add missing tokens for scroll-driven animations. Implement CSS custom property fallbacks for older browsers.
deliverables: globals.css - Complete token system with all DESIGN.md tokens implemented
tokens.css - Scroll animation tokens, stagger delays, glow effects
CSS @theme block - All tokens mapped to Tailwind utilities
acceptance_criteria: All TOKENS.md tokens implemented as CSS custom properties
Scroll animation tokens: --scroll-opacity, --scroll-y, --scroll-scale, --scroll-blur
Dark mode support via .dark class with automatic token switching
All Tailwind utilities verified: bg-bg-base, text-fg-primary, shadow-glow-sm
No pure #000 or #fff, all tinted to brand hue (~160)

roadmap.title: Typography System - Unbounded and Onest Implementation
roadmap.description: Implement the complete typography system per DESIGN.md. Ensure Unbounded is used ONLY for headings >=20px. Onest for all body text, UI elements, buttons, nav, product card titles. Configure font-optical-sizing, font-kerning, text-wrap: balance for headings. Set correct line-height and letter-spacing: normal for Cyrillic.
deliverables: src/lib/typography.ts - Typography utility classes and variants
globals.css - Font-face declarations, base typography styles
All components audited - Unbounded only on headings >=20px
acceptance_criteria: Unbounded used exclusively for display/heading elements >=20px
Onest used for all body, UI, buttons, product names, card content
line-height: 1.1 for headings, 1.6-1.7 for body text
letter-spacing: normal on all Cyrillic text
text-wrap: balance on all headings
font-optical-sizing: auto and font-kerning: normal set
No typography violations in any component

roadmap.title: Hero Section - Awwwards-Level Cinematic Treatment
roadmap.description: Redesign the Hero section to Awwwards quality. Implement: full-viewport cinematic hero with nature imagery, Apple-style text reveal animation on scroll (word-by-word), parallax background with scale and translateY, ambient glow orbs (desktop only), trust badge bar with certifications, dual CTA layout, dot grid overlay with radial mask, noise texture overlay. Remove gradient-text on subtitle. Mobile: simplified reveal.
deliverables: Hero.tsx - Redesigned with text reveal, parallax, trust bar
HeroBackground.tsx - Enhanced with dot grid, noise, glow orbs
TextReveal.tsx - Reusable word/char reveal component
Hero.module.css - Scoped animations (stagger, reveal keyframes)
acceptance_criteria: Text reveal: word-by-word on desktop, section-level on mobile
Parallax: background moves at different rate than content on scroll
No gradient-text anywhere in hero
Trust badges: GMP, ISO, Halal, 50+ countries visible
prefers-reduced-motion: all animations disabled, content visible immediately
Mobile: no heavy blur/backdrop-filter, simplified animations
Hero works at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px, 1920px
First Contentful Paint < 1.5s

roadmap.title: Scroll Animation System - GSAP ScrollTrigger and Lenis
roadmap.description: Build a comprehensive scroll animation system. Implement: Lenis smooth scroll (desktop only), GSAP ScrollTrigger for section-level reveal animations, Apple-style text reveal component (reusable), parallax layers, stagger animations for card grids, progress indicator. All animations: transform + opacity only, ease-out curves, 0.7s duration, 0.06s stagger.
deliverables: src/lib/scroll.ts - Lenis init, GSAP ScrollTrigger config, reduced-motion check
src/components/ui/TextReveal.tsx - Reusable text reveal component
src/components/ui/ScrollSection.tsx - Section wrapper with reveal animation
src/components/ui/ParallaxLayer.tsx - Reusable parallax container
src/components/layout/SmoothScrollProvider.tsx - Updated with mobile check
acceptance_criteria: Lenis smooth scroll active on desktop (>=768px), disabled on mobile
GSAP ScrollTrigger: section reveals with 0.7s duration, power3.out ease
TextReveal: supports word-by-word and character-by-character modes
All animations use transform + opacity only
prefers-reduced-motion: all scroll animations disabled
No layout thrashing, will-change used appropriately
Scroll animation performance: 60fps on mid-range devices

roadmap.title: Certificates Marquee - Infinite Scroll Animation
roadmap.description: Build a horizontal infinite marquee for certification badges (GMP, ISO, Halal, FDA, HACCP). Use CSS animation for 60fps performance. Implement: seamless loop, pause on hover, reduced-motion fallback (static row), proper ARIA labels. Logos as optimized SVG or WebP.
deliverables: CertificatesSection.tsx - Marquee with infinite scroll
globals.css - @keyframes marquee animation
public/images/certs/ - Optimized certification logos (SVG or WebP)
acceptance_criteria: Infinite horizontal scroll with seamless loop (no visible jump)
CSS-only animation (no JS animation loop) for performance
Pause on hover/focus
prefers-reduced-motion: static horizontal row, no animation
Certification logos: optimized, consistent sizing, proper alt text
Works on mobile with touch support

roadmap.title: Products Section - Premium Card Grid with Hover Interactions
roadmap.description: Redesign the products section with a premium, varied card grid. Asymmetric grid with varied card sizes, rich imagery, subtle hover interactions. Each card: product image (WebP), name (Onest), short description (1-2 lines), CTA. Hover: scale(1.02) + shadow increase + subtle image zoom. No glassmorphism. Mobile: horizontal scroll with snap.
deliverables: ProductsSection.tsx - Asymmetric grid layout
ProductCard.tsx - Redesigned with hover interactions, Onest font
ProductCard.module.css - Scoped hover animations
public/images/products/ - All product images as WebP (<=100KB each)
acceptance_criteria: Grid: asymmetric layout with varied sizes/positions
Product names: Onest font (NOT Unbounded)
Hover: scale(1.02) + shadow-md to shadow-lg, image subtle zoom
No glassmorphism (no backdrop-blur decorative usage)
All product images: WebP format, <=100KB each, lazy loaded
Mobile: horizontal scroll with touch snap, no hover effects
8 products with at least 2 visual tiers (featured/standard)
prefers-reduced-motion: no hover transforms, static cards

roadmap.title: About Section - Editorial Layout with Scroll-Triggered Timeline
roadmap.description: Redesign the About section with an editorial, magazine-style layout. Replace 2x2 grid with: large typographic statement, alternating image/text blocks, company timeline with scroll-triggered reveal, values as large icons with short descriptions. Use GSAP ScrollTrigger for timeline. Keep text minimal (1-2 lines per point).
deliverables: AboutSection.tsx - Editorial layout with alternating blocks
AboutTimeline.tsx - Scroll-triggered timeline component
public/images/about/ - Optimized about section images (WebP)
acceptance_criteria: Alternating layout: image-text, text-image (NOT 2x2 identical grid)
Timeline: scroll-triggered reveal with GSAP ScrollTrigger
Text: maximum 1-2 lines per value/point
Images: high-quality, optimized WebP, proper aspect ratios
No identical card grids, each block has unique layout
Mobile: single column, stacked layout
prefers-reduced-motion: timeline items visible immediately

roadmap.title: Business/MLM Section - Trust-Focused Conversion Layout
roadmap.description: Redesign the Business section to convert visitors to MLM partners without cheap MLM tropes. Asymmetric layout, 3-step process with icons, social proof, benefit cards with varied sizes, single prominent CTA. Remove all aggressive MLM language. Tone: professional, science-backed, community-focused.
deliverables: BusinessSection.tsx - Asymmetric conversion layout
BusinessStep.tsx - Step component for 3-step process
BusinessCard.tsx - Benefit card (Onest font, varied sizes)
acceptance_criteria: Layout: asymmetric (NOT centered, NOT identical cards)
Benefit cards: Onest font (NOT Unbounded), varied sizes
Text: 1-2 lines per benefit, NO aggressive MLM language
Social proof: 10K+ partners, 50+ countries, 15 years
Single prominent CTA
No financial freedom / high income from day 1 language
Mobile: single column, stacked, touch-friendly CTAs (>=44px)

roadmap.title: CTA Section - Asymmetric Conversion Block
roadmap.description: Redesign the final CTA section. Large typographic headline (Unbounded), single sentence of supporting text, two buttons (primary + secondary), subtle background treatment (gradient or pattern, NOT decorative orbs/particles). Scroll-triggered entrance animation. Clean, conversion-focused.
deliverables: CTASection.tsx - Clean asymmetric CTA block
CTA.module.css - Entrance animation, background treatment
acceptance_criteria: Layout: asymmetric (text left, buttons right on desktop)
Headline: Unbounded, display size, 1-2 lines maximum
Supporting text: single sentence, Onest font
Buttons: primary (filled, high contrast) + secondary (outline)
Background: subtle gradient or dot pattern (NOT decorative orbs)
No floating particles, no decorative orbs, no glassmorphism
Scroll-triggered entrance: fade + translateY
Mobile: stacked layout, full-width buttons

roadmap.title: Navbar - Premium Navigation with Scroll Behavior
roadmap.description: Enhance the Navbar with premium scroll behavior. Transparent on hero to solid on scroll, SVG logo, desktop nav with Onest font, language switcher (RU/EN/KZ), mobile hamburger menu with animation, CTA button in nav, active section indicator. No glassmorphism.
deliverables: Navbar.tsx - Enhanced with scroll behavior, mobile menu
MobileMenu.tsx - Animated mobile navigation
LanguageSwitcher.tsx - Verify RU/EN/KZ implementation
acceptance_criteria: Transparent on hero to solid background on scroll (0.3s transition)
Logo: SVG, proper sizing, links to top
Desktop nav: Onest font, >=44px touch targets
Language switcher: RU/EN/KZ, active state highlighted
Mobile: hamburger with animated open/close
CTA button in nav: visible on desktop and mobile
Active section: highlights current section on scroll
No glassmorphism, solid background when scrolled

roadmap.title: Content and Copy - Humanized RU/EN/KZ Translations
roadmap.description: Create and humanize all site copy in 3 languages. Use humanizer + humanizer-ru skills. Hero: headline, subheadline, CTA. Products: 8 names + descriptions. About: mission, values, timeline. Business: headline, steps, benefits, CTA. CTA section: headline + subtext. Footer: newsletter, contact. All text: short, specific, NO AI-isms.
deliverables: src/i18n/messages/ru.json - Complete Russian translations (humanized)
src/i18n/messages/en.json - Complete English translations
src/i18n/messages/kk.json - Complete Kazakh translations
docs/copy-review.md - Copy review checklist per section
acceptance_criteria: All 3 languages: complete coverage (no missing keys)
Russian text: humanized via humanizer-ru, NO AI-isms
English text: humanized via humanizer, natural tone
Kazakh text: grammatically correct, natural phrasing
All headlines: 1-2 lines maximum
All body text: 1-3 lines per block
No em dashes, no leverage, no synergy, no paradigm shift
next-intl useTranslations() used correctly in all components

roadmap.title: Performance Optimization - Core Web Vitals
roadmap.description: Optimize the entire site for Core Web Vitals. Target: LCP < 2.5s, FID < 100ms, CLS < 0.1. All images WebP with srcset and lazy loading. Fonts preloaded with font-display: swap. Code splitting for heavy components (GSAP, Lenis). Remove unused CSS. Minimize JS bundle. Preload critical resources.
deliverables: next.config.ts - Image optimization, preload headers, compression
public/images/ - All images optimized (WebP, proper sizes)
docs/performance-report.md - Before/after Lighthouse scores
lighthouserc.json - Lighthouse CI configuration
acceptance_criteria: LCP < 2.5s on 4G connection
FID < 100ms (no long tasks > 50ms)
CLS < 0.1 (no layout shifts)
All images: WebP, srcset, lazy loaded (except hero LCP image)
Fonts: preloaded, font-display: swap
JS bundle: < 200KB gzipped (initial load)
Lighthouse score: >= 90 on Performance, >= 95 on Accessibility

roadmap.title: Cross-Browser QA and Accessibility Audit
roadmap.description: Comprehensive QA across browsers, devices, and accessibility. Test: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge. Devices: 375px to 1920px. Reduced motion, keyboard navigation, screen reader, color contrast (WCAG AA), touch targets (>=44px). Document all issues and fixes.
deliverables: docs/qa-report.md - Complete QA checklist with pass/fail per item
docs/accessibility-audit.md - WCAG 2.2 AA compliance report
All identified issues fixed in code
acceptance_criteria: All browsers: visual parity (no layout breaks)
All breakpoints: proper layout, no horizontal overflow
prefers-reduced-motion: all animations disabled, content visible
Keyboard: all interactive elements reachable, visible focus rings
Screen reader: meaningful alt text, proper heading hierarchy
Color contrast: all text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large)
Touch targets: all interactive elements >= 44x44px on mobile
No console errors or warnings in any browser

roadmap.title: Vercel Deploy and Post-Launch Monitoring
roadmap.description: Deploy to Vercel and set up post-launch monitoring. Connect GitHub repo, configure build settings, set up custom domain (m-international.kz), enable Vercel Analytics, configure preview deployments, set up monitoring, create rollback plan.
deliverables: Vercel project configured and deployed
Custom domain: m-international.kz pointing to Vercel
Vercel Analytics enabled
docs/deploy.md - Deployment process documentation
docs/monitoring.md - Monitoring setup and alert thresholds
acceptance_criteria: Production site live at m-international.kz
All routes work: /ru, /en, /kk (no 404s)
i18n: language switcher changes URL and content correctly
Vercel Analytics: real-time data visible in dashboard
Preview deployments: working for pull requests
SSL: valid HTTPS certificate
Performance: production Lighthouse score >= 85
Rollback: documented and tested
